sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَحْمِينَا مِنَ الْمَشَاكِلِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da nas istina štiti od problema.
sentences.translationEn: This means that honesty protects us from problems.

sentences.arabic: كَسَرَ فَارِسٌ كُوبًا بِالْخَطَأِ وَأَخْبَرَ أُمَّهُ بِالْحَقِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Faris je greškom razbio čašu i rekao majci istinu.
sentences.translationEn: Faris accidentally broke a cup and told his mother the truth.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَتْهُ الْأُمُّ عَلَى صِدْقِهِ وَلَمْ تَغْضَبْ.
sentences.translation: Majka mu je zahvalila na iskrenosti i nije se naljutila.
sentences.translationEn: His mother thanked him for his honesty and was not angry.
